label: PayPal-Stripe/Advent bid response
text: Watch for PayPal's board to formally reject or counter the $53B offer and for Stripe/Advent to signal whether they will raise their bid, which will reprice fintech M&A expectations across private payment names.

label: Databricks round finalization
text: Watch for confirmation of terms on Databricks' $188B private round, as pricing details will set the benchmark for late-stage AI infrastructure valuations and signal how long its IPO delay persists.

label: Anthropic-Meta compute talks
text: Watch for any leaks on structure or size of Anthropic's early compute deal with Meta, which would clarify how strained frontier-lab capacity is and read through to cloud/GPU supplier demand.

label: Apple v. OpenAI litigation filings
text: Watch for initial court filings or OpenAI's public response in the trade-secret suit, as escalation could complicate OpenAI's already narrowing IPO window and its Apple integration.

label: Flock Safety contract fallout
text: Watch for additional police departments to follow LAPD in renegotiating or pausing Flock agreements, a spreading civil-liberties backlash that pressures the surveillance-tech startup's growth narrative.
